At Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Host Idna Boundary model · Theory Host Idna Boundary, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory Go team handles case 6044 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile net/url structure, references, escaping, IDNA, host identity, and conservative keys; owner permission, robots preference, and legal-review conclusions stay distinct; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate Unicode display, IDNA network host, IP literal, zone, port, and confusable evidence before dialing or reporting.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Host Idna Boundary model · Theory Host Idna Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Lowercasing Host is enough canonicalization for every host.
